text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the day of the Spring Fan Fest, an event
where students interact with crowds of their fans
all throughout campus.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond is actively engaging with a
group of female fans huddled around her.

text_block_list.name: Dia Fan A
text_block_list.text: I really love the way you run, Diamond!

text_block_list.name: Dia Fan A
text_block_list.text:
The way you sprint, with your gaze set dead
ahead, is just so elegant and cool!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Wow, thank you for saying that! And thank you
for all of your support!

text_block_list.name: Dia Fan A
text_block_list.text:
You're so welcome! I wanted to see you in person,
so I went to watch a race for the first time with my
friend here!

text_block_list.name: Dia Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I fell in love with you after seeing you run at the
Kikuka Sho! You were so cute during the winning
concert!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You attended a race in person for the first time
just to see me? Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Dia Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry for being so forward, but it's... so
emotional getting to talk to you face-to-face!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! I'm overjoyed that you came to speak to
me too. ♪

text_block_list.name: Dia Fan B
text_block_list.text:
By the way, which events will you be participating
in today?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'll be in the No-Holds-Barred Matching Game!
It's like a regular matching game except we'll be
using giant cards on the track. ♪

text_block_list.name: Dia Fan B
text_block_list.text: What makes it "no-holds-barred"?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's called that because we'll be collecting the
cards while racing around. The order of play isn't
determined, so the winner is whoever is fastest.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Also, players can use challenge cards to face off
against each other for a chance at stealing their
opponent's cards. ♪

text_block_list.name: Dia Fan B
text_block_list.text: S-sounds intense...

text_block_list.name: Dia Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you'll win, though! We'll be rooting for
you!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! I'll have to go all out since you'll be
cheering me on! ♪

text_block_list.name: Dia Fans
text_block_list.text: S-so cuuute!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Don't you know it's rude to spy on people
like that?
choice_data_list: I didn't want to ruin the mood.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that she looked so happy talking with
her fans that I didn't want to interrupt their chat.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I didn't mean to get so carried away... Oh, how
embarrassing...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
May I have your attention, please? Will the
contestants of the No-Holds-Barred Matching
Game please make their way to the waiting area?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's me. I'd better get going!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Welcome to the game of memory, wits, and
stamina—the No-Holds-Barred Matching Game!
Our six contestants are now making their
entrance!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Intuition, gut feeling, and passion! The winner will
be me, El!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Freshwater crabs, hairy crabs, snow crabs! Time to
get this crab party started!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Heh... Looks like we got an interesting lineup.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Oh, come on... I didn't sign up for a kids' pageant.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...That's right. We're supposed to match cards
with the same patterns...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Uh... Who are you talking to, Cafe?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Our contestants have reached their respective
starting positions! Now, let the No-Holds-Barred
Matching Game... BEGIN!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: BANG!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
For this game, our contestants have to race
around the track while flipping over cards.
Picking identical cards will net the players points!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Nooooo! It's differeeent!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Since all the contestants are turning over cards
simultaneously, this game demands greater
concentration than the regular version!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yes! I got a match! ♪

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond is racking up points slowly but
surely!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
What's this?! Manhattan Cafe is swiftly matching
up cards one after another, putting her in the
lead!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The matching card is... over there on the right?
Got it... Thank you...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
She hasn't made a mismatch even once! Could
talking to yourself about the cards before
flipping them be the key to avoiding mistakes?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
We have five minutes left on the clock! Oh?
Nakayama Festa is making a move! Is she going to
use the card she picked up earlier?!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, sweetheart. Time to use the ace up my
sleeve.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Gasp! A challenge card!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
What's this?! Nakayama Festa has played a
challenge card against Satono Diamond!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
A challenge card allows players to decide how
many points they want to wager in a challenge,
and the winner gets all those points!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Wait! I'm playing my challenge card too!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
And here comes Sirius Symboli with another
challenge card! It's become a three-way battle!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: So, how many points shall we wager?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
How about 500 points? That would allow me to
catch up with Cafe.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Heh, what a levelheaded response. It would've
been way more fun if you'd gotten caught up in
the moment and gone all in!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Let's get this started, then. Come on!

text_block_list.name: The Three
text_block_list.text: Rock, paper, scissors, shoot!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yes! I won!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Heh, you didn't even flinch. All right, then. Go
ahead and take my points!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond now has a thousand points! That
puts her even with Manhattan Cafe! But wait,
what's this?!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...I win.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Nooooo! So much for my plan to yoink all the
points from the top contender!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
The battle between Manhattan Cafe and Gold
Ship ends in a win for Manhattan Cafe! Gold Ship
has lost all of her hard-earned points!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Time's up! And the winner of the No-Holds-Barred
Matching Game is... Manhattan Cafe!

text_block_list.name: Dia Fan B
text_block_list.text: Awww! You were so close, Diamond!

text_block_list.name: Dia Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I really enjoyed seeing all your different
expressions during the game, though!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I'm glad you had fun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The opportunity to interact with her fans up close
made the Fan Fest a great event for Satono
Diamond!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I wager all my points!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Haha! Going all in, huh? Now we're talking! I call!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: No complaints from me either! Let's do this!

text_block_list.name: The Three
text_block_list.text: Rock, paper, scissors, shoot!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yes! I won!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe you beat me at a mind game... You
sure are somethin'.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Go ahead and take the points.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond successfully acquires both
Nakayama Festa's and Sirius Symboli's points,
knocking Manhattan Cafe off the top spot!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Mwahaha! I've been waiting for this moment! The
master fisher STRIKES! I challenge YOU, Satono!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: All right, chum! Get ready to dance!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Rock, paper, scissors, shoot!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! Looks like it's my win! ♪

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Incredible! Satono Diamond saw right through
Gold Ship's strategy! The conniving Gold Ship
suffers a crushing blow!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Time's up! The winner of the No-Holds-Barred
Matching Game is... Satono Diamond!

text_block_list.name: Dia Fan B
text_block_list.text: Congratulations, Diamond!

text_block_list.name: Dia Fan A
text_block_list.text: I had no idea you had such a daring side to you!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ Everyone was watching, so I had to do
my very best!

text_block_list.name: Dia Fan A
text_block_list.text: Y-you're just too cool! Consider me a forever fan!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I really appreciate it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The opportunity to interact with her fans up close
made the Fan Fest a great event for Satono
Diamond!
